content: GANDHI INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY , ODISHA, GUNUPUR @) (GIET UNIVERSITY) R DIST- RAYAGADA (ODISHA), PIN-765022 [Established vide Odisha Act-23 of 2018, Included by UGC and Approved AICTE, New Delhi] OFFICE OF THE CONTROLLER OF EXAMINATIONS Ref. No. GIETU/Exam/2025/{(540 Date: -22/11/2025 NOTICE This is for the information of all concerned that due to administrative reasons the B.Tech (2023-2027 Batch) examination scheduled today (22.11.2025) is rescheduled to 27.11.2025 from 2.30 PM to 5.30 PM. Also the Supplementary examination scheduled today (22.11.2025) for B.Tech (2022-2026 Batch) are rescheduled to 27.11.2025 for 2.30PM to 5.30PM. All other supplementary examinations will be conducted as per the schedule. b Memo No: 164 ( 35) Date: 22.11.2025 g pﬂ/’ln)% ntroller of Examinations GIET University Copy to: Vice- Chancellor/ Registrar/Dean SoET for information. All HoDs/ All Coordinators/All Hostels for information and necessary action. They are requested to inform the students. GIETU Website/Notice Board. M Centroller of Examinations GIET University
